name: ClawScan
description: Run ClawScan security scans from OpenClaw.

binary.description: ClawScan executable path or command name.

defaultProfile.description: Profile to use when a tool call does not specify profile or scanners.

defaultScanners.description: Scanner ids to use when a tool call does not specify scanners or profile.

defaultOutputDir.description: Directory where scan artifacts are written.

json.description: Pass --json by default so ClawScan emits structured output.

sandboxImage.description: Docker image for ClawScan sandboxed scanner execution.

sandboxEnv.description: Environment variable names to allow through the ClawScan sandbox.
